description: ENECHANGE is a Japanese energy comparison and switching service for household electricity and gas plans, including support for moving-related utility setup. It is operated by ENECHANGE Ltd.
summary: enechange.jp exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://enechange.jp/api/apps_in_chatgpt/v1/mcp; no public HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found.

surfaces.name: エネチェンジ Home 電気・ガス比較 MCP Server
